description_long: This object is a minimalist, modern toothbrush with a single, continuous form that curves smoothly from the base to the head. The entire structure appears to be made from a uniform, matte material, lacking any visible color accents or textural variations. The handle is broad and flat, gradually curving upward to form a right angle, which then transitions into the head. There are no visible bristles or detailed features on the head, giving it a highly stylized and abstract appearance. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible logos, grip textures, or ergonomic indentations. The overall design suggests a conceptual or prototype toothbrush, rather than a fully functional consumer product.
description: A minimalist, single-piece toothbrush with a smooth, continuous curve and no visible bristles or detailing. The surface is matte and unadorned, emphasizing a modern, abstract design.
description_view_0: The object is seen from the front, showing the broad, flat surface and the smooth upward curve forming a right angle.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gentle, continuous curve from the base to the head, emphasizing the object's flatness and lack of bristle detail.
description_view_2: From above, the object appears as a wide, flat strip with a subtle curve, and the head is indistinguishable from the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, again showing the smooth, right-angled curve and the uniform surface.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: No visible bristles or bristle arrangement are present; the head is a smooth, featureless extension of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is broad, flat, and smoothly curves upward at a right angle, with no visible grip texture or ergonomic features.
